name: UBA : Honeytoken Activity
notes: Detects activity using a Honeytoken account.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Systems with Honeytoken Accounts
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Honeytoken Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Honeytoken Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Systems with Honeytoken Accounts
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Honeytoken Accounts - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
